description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern L-shaped kitchen layout with a combination of base cabinets, wall cabinets, and a tall pantry unit. The cabinetry is predominantly white with flat panel doors and drawers, accented by sleek bar pulls in a metallic finish. The countertops are a warm wood tone, providing a natural contrast to the white cabinetry. Integrated appliances, such as a cooktop and oven, are visible, along with a built-in sink. The tall pantry cabinet offers ample vertical storage, while the upper wall cabinets provide additional space for kitchen essentials. The unit is set on a wood-patterned floor panel, suggesting a modular installation suitable for urban interiors.
description: Modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with white flat panel doors, wood countertops, and integrated appliances, including a tall pantry and wall cabinets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shaped layout, base cabinets, wood countertop, and upper wall cabinets with visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall pantry cabinet, integrated appliances, and the depth of the cabinetry ensemble.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of the base and wall cabinets, with less detail on handles and hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the open workspace, cooktop, and the arrangement of the cabinetry components.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite with base cabinets, wall cabinets, and tall pantry cabinet
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, and drawers
